commands.review_summary:
The branch changes Feishu quoted-message reply routing and card/media context, adds persisted hydration for quoted streaming cards, and includes broad unrelated release and current-main drift.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main handles normal interactive-card bodies but lacks the PR's fallback for card-id stubs and client-upgrade placeholder text; the branch has focused tests exercising that missing path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A bounded automated repair can extract the unique hydration remainder onto current main, but the contributor must still supply exact-head real Feishu proof before merge.
